observed_problem: The first parser assumed the real-flight idle sentinel 1500 for simulation logs; simulation rfly_ctrl_lxl uses zero while idle, making every 1 Hz row appear anomalous.
correction: Simulation event truth is now taken from the published TestInfo injection/end interval; rfly_ctrl_lxl with zero idle is only a fallback.
invalidated_outputs: First 2026-07-20 batch run prior to this correction. Its Wind metrics must not be used.
